user.title: iStore Solar
user.description: Set up the experimental iStore Solar integration with the Local Storage value named dtv_access_token. Username/password login is not supported yet. {error_detail}

reauth_confirm.title: Update iStore Solar access token
reauth_confirm.description: Enter a replacement dtv_access_token from the iStore portal. {error_detail}

error.api_error: The iStore API returned an error
error.malformed_response: The iStore API response could not be understood
error.server_error: The iStore API returned an error
error.unsupported_response: This iStore account response is not supported yet

abort.reauth_failed: Could not find the existing iStore Solar entry
abort.reauth_successful: The iStore Solar access token was updated
abort.wrong_account: The replacement token belongs to a different account
